title: eriastrum harwoodii
intro: Eriastrum harwoodii, also known as Harwood's buckwheat, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the phlox family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eriastrum harwoodii include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to create teas, infusions, and topical ointments for various health benefits.
